edits.slides.5.highlight: I moved everything into one header line — and made every action one click away.
edits.slides.7.content: I added two tools for one question: where exactly is the problem?

setFields.slides.2.highlight: These problems had gone unreported — doctors assumed it was just how the tool worked.
setFields.slides.9.context: Feedback collected during the iTero early access program, before full rollout.
